segments.text: Dominion and awe belong to God; he establishes order in the heights of heaven.
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: Can his forces be numbered? On whom does his light not rise?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: How then can a mortal be righteous before God? How can one born of woman be pure?
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: If even the moon is not bright and the stars are not pure in his eyes,
segments.speaker: Bildad

segments.text: how much less a mortal, who is but a maggot— a human being, who is only a worm!
segments.speaker: Bildad
